top3.sql:
SELECT 
    i_class,
    s_store_id,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE 
    d_quarter_name = '1999Q4'
GROUP BY 
    i_class, s_store_id
ORDER BY 
    i_class, s_store_id
LIMIT 100;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    i_class,
    s_store_id,
    SUM(ss_ext_sales_price) AS total_sales
FROM 
    store_sales
    JOIN item ON ss_item_sk = i_item_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON ss_sold_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN store ON ss_store_sk = s_store_sk
WHERE 
    d_quarter_name = '1999Q4'
GROUP BY 
    i_class, s_store_id
ORDER BY 
    i_class, s_store_id
LIMIT 100;
